query:
SELECT t.stationCode, t.stationTaskStatus, COUNT(*) AS rowCount
FROM station_tasks t
JOIN products p ON p.id = t.productId
WHERE p.batchNo IN (
'01400003031','01400003032','01400003033','01400003034','01400003035','01400003036','01400003037','01400003038','01400003039',
'01400003040','01400003041','01400003042','01400003043','01400003044','01400003045','01400003046','01400003047','01400003048'
)
GROUP BY t.stationCode, t.stationTaskStatus
ORDER BY t.stationCode, t.stationTaskStatus;
